goal: Fix the public detail On This Page/On This Work TOC rail width so collapse controls and TOC text are not squeezed on desktop.
changed: Added Playwright regression coverage for Blog and Work detail TOC rail width.
Changed desktop detail grids to allocate an explicit 20rem right rail.
Removed extra desktop aside padding that consumed TOC text width.
Hardened TableOfContents header flex sizing for title and Collapse/Expand button.
notChanged: Backend, DTO, load-test, HLS, cache, or production server behavior.

validations.red: failed as expected with TOC width 144px

risks: The desktop layout is intentionally less symmetrical at xl because the right rail now has explicit width.
Full core E2E was not rerun for this UI-only slice.
